title: Auto-Refresh when changing from tabs within a board
excerpt:
Hello, I noticed that when you change tabs (within a board, not google tabs), it refreshes the tabs you go to. Is there anyway to stop auto-refreshing when you change from tab to tab? 
I only ask this as I’m making a sub…

posts.author: vchan (Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, I noticed that when you change tabs (within a board, not google tabs), it refreshes the tabs you go to. Is there anyway to stop auto-refreshing when you change from tab to tab?

I only ask this as I’m making a submission form extension and I don’t want all the input to be erased just from changing tabs. Thank you!
